stamina_small.name: Micro-Battery
stamina_small.desc: Restores 45 Stamina. Standard issue energy cell.
stamina_small.detailedDesc: A compact energy cell used to restore short bursts of stamina; cheap and common.
stamina_small.aiPrompt: Icon: small glowing cyan battery with circuit etchings, 2D game UI style

stamina_large.name: Kinetic Dynamo
stamina_large.detailedDesc: A reliable mid-tier energy core favored by trainers for long sessions.
stamina_large.aiPrompt: Icon: medium cylindrical green power cell with neon filaments, sci-fi UI sprite

stamina_xl.name: Entropy Surge
stamina_xl.desc: Fully restores Stamina and adds +75 Overcharge.
stamina_xl.detailedDesc: A master-class energy condenser; rare and expensive, grants large immediate stamina and overcharge.
stamina_xl.aiPrompt: Icon: ornate corseted energy core with pulsing purple flux, epic item UI sprite

xp_scroll.name: Combat Data Disc
xp_scroll.desc: Grants 2,500 XP to hero. Processed battle recordings.
xp_scroll.detailedDesc: A compact data disc containing curated combat logs; delivers moderate XP when consumed.
xp_scroll.aiPrompt: Icon: holographic blue data disc with floating code rings, sleek sci-fi style

xp_tome.name: Tactical Matrix
xp_tome.desc: Grants 12,000 XP to hero. Advanced combat algorithms.
xp_tome.detailedDesc: An advanced algorithmic tome that imprints combat tactics for faster leveling.
xp_tome.aiPrompt: Icon: metallic data-tome with glowing runes and circuit patterns, premium UI sprite

xp_ultra_tome.name: Neural Overlay
xp_ultra_tome.desc: Grants 150,000 XP to hero. Master-level skill imprinting.
xp_ultra_tome.detailedDesc: A master-class imprint protocol. Use with care; grants massive XP to a single hero.
xp_ultra_tome.aiPrompt: Icon: translucent neural lattice overlay with golden filaments, legendary-quality UI sprite

catalyst_fire.name: Inferno Catalyst
catalyst_fire.desc: Grants 20,000 XP. Doubled if used on Fire heroes.
catalyst_fire.detailedDesc: A volatile orb of pure flame. Fire-aligned heroes resonate strongly with its energy.

catalyst_water.name: Abyssal Catalyst
catalyst_water.desc: Grants 20,000 XP. Doubled if used on Water heroes.
catalyst_water.detailedDesc: A swirling teardrop of pure water. Water-aligned heroes resonate strongly with its energy.

catalyst_wind.name: Zephyr Catalyst
catalyst_wind.desc: Grants 20,000 XP. Doubled if used on Wind heroes.
catalyst_wind.detailedDesc: A glowing feather of pure wind. Wind-aligned heroes resonate strongly with its energy.

catalyst_light.name: Solar Catalyst
catalyst_light.desc: Grants 20,000 XP. Doubled if used on Light heroes.
catalyst_light.detailedDesc: A star fragment of pure light. Light-aligned heroes resonate strongly with its energy.

catalyst_dark.name: Umbral Catalyst
catalyst_dark.desc: Grants 20,000 XP. Doubled if used on Dark heroes.
catalyst_dark.detailedDesc: A jagged shard of pure darkness. Dark-aligned heroes resonate strongly with its energy.

catalyst_neutral.name: Stable Catalyst
catalyst_neutral.detailedDesc: A perfectly balanced sphere of energy. Provides high consistent XP to all heroes regardless of element.

bond_gift.name: Resonating Core
bond_gift.desc: Increases Bond by 250. Preferred by Water.
bond_gift.detailedDesc: A common gift that resonates with watery affinities; modest bond gains.
bond_gift.aiPrompt: Icon: small pink crystalline heart within rotating silver frame, gift item sprite

bond_gift_rare.name: Gale Bouquet
bond_gift_rare.desc: Increases Bond by 800. Preferred by Wind.
bond_gift_rare.detailedDesc: A rare arrangement that strongly appeals to wind-aligned heroes.
bond_gift_rare.aiPrompt: Icon: bouquet of shimmering wind-flowers with green-blue glow, premium gift sprite

bond_gift_epic.name: Umbra Prism
bond_gift_epic.desc: Increases Bond by 2,500. Preferred by Dark.
bond_gift_epic.detailedDesc: A rare artifact that pours emotion into an offering; large bond gains when affinity matches.
bond_gift_epic.aiPrompt: Icon: dark prism pulsing with inner purple heart, dramatic gift artifact sprite

bond_gift_legendary.name: Solar Promise
bond_gift_legendary.desc: Increases Bond by 7,500. Preferred by Light.
bond_gift_legendary.detailedDesc: A legendary pledge of devotion; enormous bond gains when given to a matching hero.
bond_gift_legendary.aiPrompt: Icon: radiant golden heart encased in a spinning halo, legendary gift sprite

multiverse_core.name: Multiverse Engine Core
multiverse_core.desc: Instantly levels a hero to 100. Ultimate endgame catalyst.
multiverse_core.detailedDesc: The condensed soul of a dying reality. Provides enough data to maximize any hero instantly.

xp_grand_tome.name: Grand Archive of Mugen
xp_grand_tome.desc: Grants 5,000,000 XP. Contains the entire history of a lost series.
xp_grand_tome.detailedDesc: A legendary data-crystal vibrating with the power of billions of simulated combat hours.

bond_eternal_crystal.name: Eternal Spark of Unity
bond_eternal_crystal.desc: Increases Bond by 50,000. Forges an unbreakable tie.
bond_eternal_crystal.detailedDesc: A fragment of the very first summoning circle. Its resonance is absolute and heartwarming.

void_capsule.name: Void Compression Capsule
void_capsule.desc: Permanent +100 Max Stamina. Experimental high-yield energy.
void_capsule.detailedDesc: Bypasses normal safety protocols to drastically increase your tactical endurance.

ascension_injector.name: Ascension Injector
ascension_injector.detailedDesc: Injects raw multiverse data directly into a hero's core. Can only be used on Level 100 subjects.

omega_serum.name: Omega Stat Serum
omega_serum.desc: Permanently grants +15% to all hero stats.
omega_serum.detailedDesc: A highly concentrated solution of refined essence. Provides a permanent massive stat multiplier.

paradox_core.name: Paradox Talent Core
paradox_core.desc: Instantly maxes all current skill levels for one hero.
paradox_core.detailedDesc: A temporal artifact that pulls combat experience from every version of the hero across time.

xp_omega_log.name: Omega Combat Log
xp_omega_log.desc: Grants 25,000,000 XP to hero. Absolute data density.
xp_omega_log.detailedDesc: A hard-coded memory drive containing the combat data of an entire timeline's history.

xp_soul_gem.name: Transcendent Soul Gem
xp_soul_gem.desc: Grants 45,000,000 XP to hero. Pure spirit energy.
xp_soul_gem.detailedDesc: A gem forged from the concentrated willpower of a thousand fallen champions.

xp_reality_script.name: Final Reality Script
xp_reality_script.desc: Grants 70,000,000 XP to hero. Re-write potential.
xp_reality_script.detailedDesc: A holographic manuscript that allows a hero to fundamentally alter their combat limits through data injection.

junk_floppy.name: Corrupted Floppy
junk_floppy.desc: Salvaged scrap. Worth a few credits at the vendor.
junk_floppy.detailedDesc: An obsolete data disk pulled from the rift debris. Useless in battle, but collectors pay for the nostalgia.

junk_fork.name: Bent Fork
junk_fork.desc: Salvaged scrap. Worth a few credits at the vendor.
junk_fork.detailedDesc: A twisted utensil warped by dimensional pressure. Sells for pocket change.

junk_sock.name: Lone Sock
junk_sock.desc: Salvaged scrap. Worth a few credits at the vendor.
junk_sock.detailedDesc: Its pair was lost to the void. Strangely warm.

junk_remote.name: Glitched Remote
junk_remote.desc: Salvaged tech. Fetches a modest sum.
junk_remote.detailedDesc: A universal remote that occasionally changes the channel of reality itself. Tech buyers want it.

junk_watch.name: Cracked Chrono-Watch
junk_watch.desc: Salvaged relic. A solid payday at the vendor.
junk_watch.detailedDesc: A timepiece frozen at the moment of the rift. The crystal core still hums with value.

treasure_resonant_core.name: Resonant Treasure Core
treasure_resonant_core.desc: A rare rift artifact. Sells for a fortune.
treasure_resonant_core.detailedDesc: Pulsing with condensed dimensional energy, this artifact is prized by every collector in the city.

cook_grand_banquet.name: The Grand Banquet
cook_grand_banquet.desc: Restores 300 Stamina (overcharge) and grants 2,000,000 XP. The single best meal in the city.
cook_grand_banquet.detailedDesc: Every dish the kitchen knows how to make, all at once. Nobody has ever finished the whole table.

cook_hearty_feast.name: Hearty Feast
cook_hearty_feast.desc: Restores 320 Stamina (overcharge). Nobody leaves this table hungry.
cook_hearty_feast.detailedDesc: A slab of seared steak big enough for the whole crew, cooked to order.

cook_sushi_platter.name: Chef's Sushi Platter
cook_sushi_platter.desc: Restores 260 Stamina (overcharge) and increases Bond by 400.
cook_sushi_platter.detailedDesc: A meal shared is a bond formed -- fresh-cut and plated with care.

cook_wine_reserve.name: Vintage Wine Reserve
cook_wine_reserve.desc: Increases Bond by 3,000. Preferred by Earth.
cook_wine_reserve.detailedDesc: Cellared long before the rift, this bottle loosens tongues and opens hearts.

cook_whiskey_toast.name: Aged Whiskey Toast
cook_whiskey_toast.desc: Increases Bond by 1,000. Preferred by Fire.
cook_whiskey_toast.detailedDesc: One glass, raised to the crew. Burns a little going down.

cook_pepper_stew.name: Spicy Pepper Stew
cook_pepper_stew.desc: Grants 50,000 XP. Doubled for Fire heroes.
cook_pepper_stew.detailedDesc: A dish that fights back. Fire-aligned heroes eat it like candy.

cook_melon_salad.name: Chilled Melon Salad
cook_melon_salad.desc: Grants 50,000 XP. Doubled for Water heroes.
cook_melon_salad.detailedDesc: Sliced cold and served fast, this one's a favorite down by the docks.

cook_windy_waffles.name: Windy Waffles
cook_windy_waffles.desc: Grants 50,000 XP. Doubled for Wind heroes.
cook_windy_waffles.detailedDesc: Light, airy, and gone in three bites -- somehow still filling.

cook_honey_tart.name: Honey Glow Tart
cook_honey_tart.desc: Grants 50,000 XP. Doubled for Light heroes.
cook_honey_tart.detailedDesc: Golden and glowing, this tart seems to hum faintly under the right hands.

cook_blackened_sausage.name: Blackened Sausages
cook_blackened_sausage.desc: Grants 50,000 XP. Doubled for Dark heroes.
cook_blackened_sausage.detailedDesc: Charred past the point most people would call it done. Dark-aligned heroes swear by it.

cook_trail_pretzel.name: Trail Pretzel
cook_trail_pretzel.detailedDesc: No element, no gimmick, just a solid pretzel that hits the spot.
